title: Slore SMP
description:
A modpack for our SMP it includes mods like:

- Voice chat
- Origins
body:
# Slore SMP Modpack

This is a modpack for a application only origins servers, you can apply any time you want [here](https://discord.com/invite/W5MZT2ntbJ), this is mainly a server for building! There's not a very big PvP community in here. But we do have a lot of player-made towns you can join and make new friends in! # Requirements to join the server * Play on Minecraft **JAVA** * Use **THIS** modpack * Be **above 15** years of age * Have a working microphone, able to speak in-game
